name: sm_sectors
query:
SELECT 
    s.id,
    s.sector_name ,
    SUM(CASE WHEN se.alert_level > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS number_of_alerts, 
    count(*) as number_of_sensors,
    max(se.alert_level) AS alert_level
FROM 
    sm_sectors s
    INNER JOIN sm_assets a ON a.sector_id = s.id
    INNER JOIN sm_sensors se ON a.id = se.asset_id
GROUP BY  
    s.id, s.sector_name;
